description: The ProtectedRoute component performs two separate loading states (user auth loading + permissions loading) but the timeout logic (lines 47-52) applies a single 10-second timer to both. If user loads fast but permissions are slow, the timeout message is misleading. Should separate timeouts or show different messages based on which query is slow.
successCriteria: Separate timeouts for auth loading (5s) and permissions loading (10s)
Error messages specify which resource failed to load (user auth vs permissions)
The loading spinner shows which resource is being loaded
